title: Percakapan di Antara Dua Stasiun
theme: Menemukan koneksi tak terduga dalam rutinitas perjalanan, menunjukkan bahwa kebaikan kecil dapat membuka pintu hubungan baru yang berarti.

cover.prompt: A cinematic photograph capturing the serene yet bustling atmosphere of a morning commuter train. Soft, warm natural light gently streams through a large train window, illuminating the interior. The primary focus is on a modern laptop screen, displaying abstract graphic design elements with a subtle, soft glow, placed in the foreground. Beside it, a warm cup is visible. In the background, blurred forms of other passengers are subtly suggested, appearing as gentle, indistinct silhouettes, conveying a sense of shared journey without detailed features. Outside the window, a soft, out-of-focus impression of city buildings passes by. The composition emphasizes a feeling of focused routine and quiet introspection amidst the daily rhythm. Rule of thirds, soft lighting transitions, balanced composition.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Mira's monotonous KRL commute is disrupted when her card fails. A stranger, Bima, helps her and they end up in a charming conversation about shared interests. As Mira exits, Bima subtly leaves his number on the card, transforming her routine into a hopeful new beginning.
